name: Log Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, corn syrup, milk and butter in a pan.
2. Cook to firm-ball stage.
3. Set aside to cool.
4. Add vanilla and beat until firm.
5. Shape into rolls about 1 1/2 inch thick and 8 inches long (easy to roll).
6. When cold, dip in melted chocolate.
7. Roll in chopped nuts.
8. Slice when cold.
